problems.diagnostic: left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type '<error>' and 'bool', but must be of the same type
problems.cause: Port_1 and Port_2 are AADL port features, not AGREE boolean expressions
problems.minimal_edit: Replace Port_1 and Port_2 with boolean variables or expressions that are valid in AGREE context

problems.diagnostic: named thing must be an expression with a type

problems.minimal_edit: Replace Port_1 and Port_2 with valid AGREE boolean expressions or variables
